name: Potassium electrolytes
summary: Decision-ready summary: Potassium electrolytes is best framed for electrolyte replacement; blood pressure support; muscle function; safety screen: kidney disease; ACE inhibitors/ARBs; potassium-sparing diuretics.
description: Potassium electrolytes support physiologic electrical gradients and can contribute to blood pressure regulation and muscle function in deficiency states.
safetyNotes: Generally well tolerated for most users.
